title: DIY Doctor 4-Piece Wallpaper Scraper Set – Includes 3 Strippers & 1 Multifunctional Putty Scraper – Paint Scraper Tools in Sizes 1.5", 2.5", 3.5" – Perfect for Wallpaper Removal, DIY & Painting Tasks
features: HIGH-QUALITY FLEXIBLE STEEL BLADES FOR TOUGH JOBS: Crafted from durable high carbon steel, our wallpaper scraper and paint scraper tools are designed for flexibility and strength. These tools make filling and scraping easy, ensuring smooth results whether you're removing wallpaper or applying filler.

ERGONOMIC HANDLE FOR COMFORT AND CONTROL: Designed with user comfort in mind, the handle on our scraper tool ensures a secure grip and reduced fatigue. Tackle lengthy wallpaper removal or use it as a putty knife or paint scraper with ease, maintaining control for precise results.

MULTIFUNCTIONAL SCRAPER TOOL FOR VERSATILE APPLICATIONS: This set includes tools perfect for a variety of tasks—use as a wallpaper stripper, a paint scraper for metal, or even a putty knife. Our tools are versatile, making them a great addition to any DIY enthusiast’s toolbox.

VARIETY OF SIZES FOR EVERY PROJECT: Our wallpaper scraper set includes 1.5", 2.5", and 3.5" blade widths, allowing you to handle any project, big or small. Whether you’re using the blades as a putty knife or a scraper tool, there’s a size for every task.

5-IN-1 MULTITOOL FOR MULTIPLE USES: The set includes a versatile painter’s multitool that can function as a putty knife, wallpaper scraper, or even a paint scraper. It’s perfect for opening cans, cleaning paint rollers, pulling nails, and more, making it an essential tool for any DIY job.
description: From the manufacturer Wallpaper Paint Scraper - 4pcs Set 5-in-1 Putty Tool The DIY Doctor multi-functional putty knife features a spreader, straight scraper, curved scraper, gouger, roller cleaner, paint can opener etc. A must have tool in painter's tool bag.
